_description: robot distribution settings seed. install.sh --step=claude merges these into ~/.claude/settings.json using additive-for-arrays + preserve-existing-scalars policy. See docs/INSTALL.md §settings-merge.

hooks.command: PARENT=$HOME/robot; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PARENT"); { echo '## Global wiki'; cat "$PARENT/wiki/INDEX.md" 2>/dev/null; echo; if [ "$ROOT" != "$PARENT" ]; then echo '## Project wiki'; cat "$ROOT/wiki/INDEX.md" 2>/dev/null; echo; fi; echo '## AGENTS.md'; cat "$ROOT/AGENTS.md" 2>/dev/null; } | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: .}}'

PARENT=$HOME/robot; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PARENT"); { echo '## Global wiki'; cat "$PARENT/wiki/INDEX.md" 2>/dev/null; echo; if [ "$ROOT" != "$PARENT" ]; then echo '## Project wiki'; cat "$ROOT/wiki/INDEX.md" 2>/dev/null; echo; fi; echo '## AGENTS.md'; cat "$ROOT/AGENTS.md" 2>/dev/null; } | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostCompact", additionalContext: .}}'
